columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Site number or department identifier

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: Customer identification number

columns.name: ORDRETYPE

columns.name: BETBET
columns.description: Bet amount or bet type code

columns.name: BETIDT
columns.description: Date of betting (potentially a FK to another table)

columns.name: KOD1

columns.name: KOD2
columns.description: Second code or category identifier

columns.name: BESKRIV

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: Order amount or price

columns.name: ANTALL
columns.description: Number of items ordered

columns.name: DATO
columns.description: Date the order was placed or relevant date

columns.name: KOD3
columns.description: Third code or category identifier

columns.name: REF_ORDRENR
columns.description: Order number for reference purposes (potentially a FK to another table)

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Time of the order or transaction timestamp

columns.name: LEASING_KUNDE
columns.description: Leasing customer identifier (potentially a FK to another table)

columns.name: FKMCOMMERCEORDERNUMBER
columns.description: External commerce order number (potentially a unique external reference)

columns.name: PICKUPPOINTLOCATIONID
columns.description: Identifier for the pickup point location (potentially a FK to another table)

columns.name: NOTAV
columns.description: Note or annotation identifier (potentially a FK to another table)

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Additional comments about the order

columns.name: KOD4
columns.description: Fourth code or category identifier

columns.name: VARENAVN_NY

columns.name: SALGSKONSULENT

columns.name: EPOSTADRESSE
columns.description: Customer email address

columns.name: ENHETSNR

columns.name: PLASSERINGSID

columns.name: OBLIG_ENHETSNR_MANGLER

columns.name: MERKNADSTYPE
